programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
Dave
programme.desc: Dave has an opportunity to open for a big rapper, but his nerves cause him to spiral into an identity crisis. When Dave asks GaTa to act as his hype man, GaTa is forced to confront memories from his past.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave is in Philly for his first concert ever, and the gang stays with his parents. After reuniting with his overnight camp friends, Dave ponders his artistic roots.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Someone breaks into Emma's car, and Elz tries to help her recover her laptop. In an effort to play his beats for Trippie, Elz ends up taking on a precarious task.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave and Ally attend her sister's wedding in Napa, and Ally wants to impress her family with the perfect maid of honour speech.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: In the season finale, Dave is trapped in a prison of his own creation. Will he escape?

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: While making a video that will vault him to global success, Dave is forced to face reality as the project threatens to implode and create an international incident.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave and Benny's friendship blossoms in strange and unexpected ways, leading them to confront questions of privilege, race, sexuality, and dermatology.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave and Elz's friendship is tested when they perform together at a bar mitzvah; GaTa has a night out.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave joins an exclusive online dating app and matches with a pop star. Technological courtship ensues, as Dave gets caught up in the excitement of a modern-day romance.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave journeys to a legendary recording studio, hoping to break through his creative block, but he is forced to confront his greatest obstacle: his own ego.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave releases his debut album Penith. The rest is history.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Back in his home town of Philadelphia, Dave grapples with his romantic origin story, both in his art and in real life.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Ally joins the tour to rekindle an old flame, while Dave looks to ignite a new one.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave gets a lesson in Southern hospitality, courtesy of his number one fan.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave makes a big decision about the tour, but it blows up in his face.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave's got a new lease on life, a new house and a new house guest. But his friends have other plans.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave attends his first Met Gala, while Gata attends his first mental health panel.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave's quest for love reaches its epic conclusion.

programme.title: Betty
programme.desc: Kirt's (probably) on a quest; Indigo's grocery gig isn't cutting it; Honeybear and Ash are all in; Camille's got flow; Winterbowl's a bust; and Janay's not here for the new guy.

programme.title: Betty
programme.desc: Confessions. Breakthroughs. New beginnings. The party's over, and it's time to come home.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave and the gang are on tour, first stop: Texas. Dave is looking for love, but Texas is looking for Lil Dicky.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Back in his home town of Philadelphia, Dave grapples with his romantic origin story, both in his art and in real life.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Ally joins the tour to rekindle an old flame, while Dave looks to ignite a new one.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: Dave makes a big decision about the tour, but it blows up in his face.

programme.title: AFL: Essendon v North Melbourne
programme.desc: Two traditional rivals go head to head under the roof and Fox Footy has every angle covered to see if the Roos can get back on the winners list.

programme.title: AFL: St Kilda v Fremantle
programme.desc: Fresh off a Ross Lyon spray, the Saints are keen to redeem themselves as they host the Dockers under lights.

programme.title: Grand Final Classics: 1999 GF NM v CAR
AFL Thrillers: R16 2012 RIC v GC
programme.desc: In Round 16, 2012, the Tigers were looking the goods to make their first finals series in over a decade. Then along came one of the great comebacks by the Gold Coast Suns. Karmichael Hunt to the rescue in a 30 Minute Thriller.

programme.title: Open Mike Top 30: Denis Pagan
programme.desc: Mike Sheahan is one of the most respected AFL journalists in the history of the game. Take a trip down memory lane with the best interviews and stories in Open Mike Top 30.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1977 GF NM v COL
programme.desc: 1977 Grand Final. The Roos and the Pies play out one of the most memorable Grand Finals in history.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 1999 PF CAR v ESS
Best Games Ever: 2004 R11 HAW v ESS
programme.desc: The 2000s - a decade where Brisbane and Geelong ruled the roost and an era of Brown, Judd and Ablett.

programme.title: Best Games Ever: 2016 PF GWS v WB
Grand Final Classics: 1999 GF NM v CAR
programme.desc: On Fox Footy we take a look back at the VFL/AFL Grand Finals over the last 50 years.

programme.title: Open Mike Top 30: Denis Pagan
programme.desc: Mike Sheahan is one of the most respected AFL journalists in the history of the game. Take a trip down memory lane with the best interviews and stories in Open Mike Top 30.

programme.title: AFL Thrillers: R16 2012 RIC v GC
programme.desc: In Round 16, 2012, the Tigers were looking the goods to make their first finals series in over a decade. Then along came one of the great comebacks by the Gold Coast Suns. Karmichael Hunt to the rescue in a 30 Minute Thriller.

programme.title: AFL Thrillers: PF 2011 HAW v COL
programme.desc: The Pies and the Hawks threw all they had at each other for the last Grand Final spot. But with the game still on the line in the last quarter it was all or nothing. Enter Collingwood superstar Luke Ball.

programme.title: Game of the Year: 2016 PF GWS v WB
Incredible Comebacks: 2000 R7 PA v ADE
programme.desc: Is there anything better than when a team looks down and out but then suddenly they flip the script and stage an incredible comeback, here are some of the best.

programme.title: Open Mike Top 30: Denis Pagan
programme.desc: Mike Sheahan is one of the most respected AFL journalists in the history of the game. Take a trip down memory lane with the best interviews and stories in Open Mike Top 30.

programme.title: AFLW: Brisbane v Hawthorn
programme.desc: A mouthwatering AFLW opening round battle as rivals and premiership contenders Brisbane and Hawthorn go head-to-head on Sunday afternoon in Springfield.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: During a busy Spring Bank Holiday, the Traffic Cops deal with the effects of drink and drugs.

programme.title: Ridiculousness
programme.desc: Rob Dyrdek and friends critique viral videos, categorizing them into "Hot Mess," "Worst Case Scenario," "Redneck Good Times," and "What Happened Last Night".

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.sub-title: I'm Off To Find A Robin
programme.desc: Lucy Beaumont risks flicking a forbidden switch, Julian Clary debates needing more pies, and Sue Perkins weighs a deer head against a boundary.

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Mike and Avery team up with an old friend to recover a potentially valuable abandoned Volkswagen. He's determined to turn over a new leaf in his fourth year in business.

programme.title: Hotel Paranormal
programme.desc: A presence in a motel in Texas unhooks the telephone off its cradle for a repo man; teens find hair locks when pulling back their bed covers; a lone woman is attacked in her room in a deserted hotel.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters
programme.desc: The team take on the twisted case of a missing luxury boat called the Saba Bank, lost in the vicinity of the Bermuda Triangle in 1974, but new leads suggest even deadlier forces are responsible.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performers.

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway?
programme.desc: Aisha Tyler hosts another hilarious episode of the legendary improv show featuring regulars Wayne Brady, Ryan Stiles and Colin Mochrie along with guest performers.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's all in the family in Moreno Valley, as Emily brings along her cowboy husband. Ivy is displeased at Mary's fraternisation with the auctioneer, and takes it out on her later.

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary decides to deal with her storage stress by introducing a bit of yoga into her routine. Ivy and Dave go head-to-head on a giant pair of sister lockers, but Dave chooses to sit out the rest of the time.

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: With around two million thefts every year, many of which happen under the cover of darkness, the Traffic Cops are often at their busiest during the night time.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Darrell Ward faces a trail nicknamed 'the obstacle course.' Todd Dewey struggles to clear a melting ice bridge. Polar veteran Alex Debogorski is pushed to the limit hauling an oversized fuel tank.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Craig and the crew are back in camp to log Saddle Ridge. After an unexpected road repair puts them behind, the crew discovers the block is chock full of boulders, making it impossible to log.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Torrential rain plays havoc with Robbie Mackay's efforts to relocate a home without wrecking it.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Craig and the crew are back in camp to log Saddle Ridge. After an unexpected road repair puts them behind, the crew discovers the block is chock full of boulders, making it impossible to log.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Put up your dukes with the Pawn Stars as the guys check out a postcard signed by legendary boxer Jack Johnson. The first African American to become heavyweight champ, will the card knock Rick out?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: It's all in the family in Moreno Valley, as Emily brings along her cowboy husband. Ivy is displeased at Mary's fraternisation with the auctioneer, and takes it out on her later.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: Darrell Ward faces a trail nicknamed 'the obstacle course.' Todd Dewey struggles to clear a melting ice bridge. Polar veteran Alex Debogorski is pushed to the limit hauling an oversized fuel tank.

programme.title: Outback Truckers
programme.desc: Torrential rain plays havoc with Robbie Mackay's efforts to relocate a home without wrecking it.

programme.title: DMV
programme.desc: At the Big Sac party Colette tries to impress Noa before his window closes. Barb's attempt to save the DMV backfires until Sally steps in.

programme.title: The Daily Show
programme.desc: A comedy news show featuring humorous takes on top stories.

programme.title: World's Most Dangerous Roads
programme.desc: Jess Fostekew and her good friend and fellow comedian Desiree Burch take on an utterly insane trip across Colorado's Rocky Mountains in a Wild West adventure.

programme.title: Mud Mountain Haulers
programme.desc: Craig and the crew are back in camp to log Saddle Ridge. After an unexpected road repair puts them behind, the crew discovers the block is chock full of boulders, making it impossible to log.

programme.title: Ashes: 2006/07 4th Test
programme.desc: The legendary 2006-2007 Ashes series. Led by Ricky Ponting, the team showcased a brilliant all-round performance, with notable contributions from Shane Warne and Glenn McGrath in their final series.

programme.title: Test Day: The Ashes Second Test Day 1
programme.desc: Travball, Bazball and the King of the pink ball Mitchell Starc head to the Gabba with Australia 1-0 up in the series.

programme.title: Test Day: The Ashes Second Test Day 1
programme.desc: Travball, Bazball and the King of the pink ball Mitchell Starc head to the Gabba with Australia 1-0 up in the series.

programme.title: Test Day: The Ashes Second Test Day 2
programme.desc: Joe Root's century gave England the upper hand on Day One. Time for Steve Smith and the Australians to go big at the Gabba on Day Two.

Golf: Australian PGA Championship FR
programme.desc: The 2025 BMW Australian PGA Championship returns to the prestigious Royal Queensland Golf Club, uniting top golfing talent from around the world.

programme.title: USPGA: Hero World Challenge Final Round
USPGA: Hero World Challenge Final Round
programme.desc: Two-time defending champion Scottie Scheffler is the man to beat as it comes down to the final day at Albany Golf Club.

programme.title: Golf: Australian Open Final Round
programme.desc: Championship Sunday at Royal Melbourne GC. Dane Rasmus Neergaard-Peterson holds a two shot lead after 54 holes. Leading Aussie is Cameron Smith, going into the Final Round two shots back from the lead.

programme.title: Golf: Australian Open Final Round
programme.desc: Championship Sunday at Royal Melbourne GC. Dane Rasmus Neergaard-Peterson holds a two shot lead after 54 holes. Leading Aussie is Cameron Smith, going into the Final Round two shots back from the lead.

programme.title: How Good is Golf: Commonwealth
programme.desc: How Good Is Golf shows you how to play, where to play and what equipment to use. Join Paul Gow as he takes you through the greatest game of all.

programme.desc: 2024 brought some spectacular golf with it. Take a look at some of the greatest holes of the year.

Golf: Genesis Championship Final Round
programme.desc: Final round action of the Genesis Championship from Woo Jeong Hills Country Club, South Korea.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: An unforgettable and hilarious portrait of life's most rewarding occupation: Parenthood. The Buckmans are a modern-day family facing the age-old dilemma of trying to raise children the right way.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: The 6th Day
programme.desc: A helicopter pilot who survives a near-fatal accident, returns home to find out that has been replaced by a duplicate version of himself.

programme.title: Cliffhanger
programme.desc: A year after his friend's death, Gabe must return to the dreaded mountain peaks, where he finds himself trapped in a desperate battle against criminals, nature and himself.

programme.title: Tango & Cash
programme.desc: Two narcotics detectives can't stand each other. When a crime lord frames them for murder, they have to buddy up to clear their names and put him away.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: When the sons of a cavalry colonel set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threaten to tear apart their once indestructible bond when the sexy Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Legends of the Fall
programme.desc: When the sons of a cavalry colonel set out to fight a war in Europe, suspicion and jealousy threaten to tear apart their once indestructible bond when the sexy Susanna enters their lives.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Jaws
programme.desc: The thriller that scared movie fans everywhere out of the water. Three men undertake a perilous journey to hunt down a great white killer shark.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to solve another case. This time, he must direct his efforts towards unravelling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by punks.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: At the Chateau De La Fare, Janet and Phillip are nearing the end of the rebuild of their two-bedroom suite; the Hutsons are trying to restore an ornate fountain.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: There is not much of an earnings gap between Raj and Irita when they enter the decisive phase in Cornwall. But that does not mean they cannot enjoy some detours.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Cristian Beadman uncovers bronze owls with saucy secrets; Fiona Bruce chats with dancer and Strictly Come Dancing judge Anton Du Beke.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Charlie Ross joins experts Tim Weeks and Charles Hanson at The Ardingly Antiques and Collectors Fair. The reds and blues go head-to-head to find some bargains that they hope will make a profit at auction.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Sir John Cockburn arrives at St George's with acute abdominal pain. Medics think the 89-year-old could have Triple A, an abdominal aortic aneurysm.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Cristian Beadman uncovers bronze owls with saucy secrets; Fiona Bruce chats with dancer and Strictly Come Dancing judge Anton Du Beke.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Two teams go head-to-head in a bid to sell their recently acquired items for a profit at auction.

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.desc: Experts Charles Hanson and Natasha Raskin Sharp take their vintage four-wheeler across Northumberland's quaint and idyllic neighbourhoods to find auction-worthy antiques.

programme.title: Nurses On The Ward
programme.desc: Following the nurses of Queen Alexandra Hospital in Portsmouth as they work across multiple areas of the hospital treating both male and female patients from a range of age groups.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a Berkshire couple find a Suffolk home with holiday let potential as their children prepare to fly the nest.

programme.title: The Great Pottery Throw Down
programme.desc: Ten home potters from around the UK are throwing, trimming and decorating their way to being crowned top potter. Their every move is watched over by judges Kate Malone and Keith Brymer Jones.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Jen bought her unique 'swiss chalet' on a bit of a whim. However it has become too much. She works full-time and the land requires an awful lot of upkeep! Can a few adjustments from Shaynna and Charlie help?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Nicki Chapman helps two entrepreneurial sisters find a Devon home for their glamping dream and visits a luxury Exmoor B&B.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Cristian Beadman uncovers bronze owls with saucy secrets; Fiona Bruce chats with dancer and Strictly Come Dancing judge Anton Du Beke.

programme.title: Bargain Hunt
programme.desc: Natasha Raskin Sharp presents from Brackley, Northamptonshire. Charles Hanson has a blast with the blues, and Danny Sebastian helps out the reds.

programme.title: Better Homes & Gardens
programme.desc: Joh meets music icon Archie Roach on the eve of his final NSW tour. Karen makes honey, chocolate and yoghurt cake. Dr Harry helps out a labrador that tugs on its lead.

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: In the hills of the Dordogne, Tim and Krys are preparing to host their largest ever event; Jon and Carmen want to renovate an abandoned swimming pool.

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie's with professional musicians Molly and Sam, who need somewhere to grow into as a family. Barrie and Tash have moved four times in 20 years and now need Phil's help looking for their final home.

programme.title: Selling Houses Australia
programme.desc: Jen bought her unique 'swiss chalet' on a bit of a whim. However it has become too much. She works full-time and the land requires an awful lot of upkeep! Can a few adjustments from Shaynna and Charlie help?

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: In West Yorkshire, Nicki Chapman helps a young Manchester couple find a countryside home for their baby with a 270,000 pound budget. She also meets a pair who escaped town life for the Yorkshire Dales.

programme.title: Most Expensive Christmas Cruise Ship
programme.desc: The World's Most Expensive Cruise offers exclusive access and behind-the-scenes insight aboard the most luxurious ship ever built.

programme.title: Escape to the Country
programme.desc: Jules Hudson helps a Berkshire couple find a Suffolk home with holiday let potential as their children prepare to fly the nest.

programme.title: 24 Hours in Emergency
programme.desc: Nineteen-year-old motorcyclist Sam is airlifted to St George's after crashing into a bus and being thrown under a car, leaving him bent double. Sam arrives in resus with multiple injuries.

programme.title: The Bone Collector
programme.desc: A bedridden detective teams up with a sharp rookie to catch a sadistic killer who leaves bizarre clues behind. As they close in they become his next targets.

programme.title: Hailey Dean Mysteries: Death On Duty
programme.desc: A psychologist and former prosecutor helps a detective investigate the murder of a former Marine.

programme.title: Chris Watts: Confessions of a Killer
Belfast
programme.desc: A poignant story of one boy's childhood amid the music and social tumult of the late 1960s.

programme.title: Murder She Baked: A Plum Pudding Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah is whipping up a special plum pudding for Christmas when she finds a man dead in his own office. The 12 days of Christmas are ticking along, and she's running out of time to find the murderer.

programme.title: Murder She Baked: A Plum Pudding Mystery
programme.desc: Hannah is whipping up a special plum pudding for Christmas when she finds a man dead in his own office. The 12 days of Christmas are ticking along, and she's running out of time to find the murderer.

programme.title: Dear Christmas
programme.desc: A podcast host develops an unexpected romance with a local firefighter during the holidays.

programme.title: Dear Christmas
programme.desc: A podcast host develops an unexpected romance with a local firefighter during the holidays.

programme.title: You Light Up My Christmas
programme.desc: Emma returns to her hometown for Christmas. She discovers the lights have gone dim in the once festive town, prompting her to reconnect with an old flame to set their hearts and the town ablaze with light again.

programme.title: You Light Up My Christmas
programme.desc: Emma returns to her hometown for Christmas. She discovers the lights have gone dim in the once festive town, prompting her to reconnect with an old flame to set their hearts and the town ablaze with light again.

programme.title: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: A school superintendent meets a single father who works as the head of the school's bankrupt music department. As she rediscovers her passion for music, she works to save the dreams of the kids who love music.

programme.title: It's Christmas, Eve
programme.desc: A school superintendent meets a single father who works as the head of the school's bankrupt music department. As she rediscovers her passion for music, she works to save the dreams of the kids who love music.

programme.title: Santa's Boots
programme.desc: Forced to take a holiday from her job in Seattle, Holly returns to her hometown, where she reluctantly agrees to become Santa's new elf at her dad's local department store.

programme.title: The Swan Princess Christmas
programme.desc: Princess Odette, Prince Derek and their trusted woodland friends reunite in this adventure for their first Christmas celebration together!

programme.title: Christmas with the Kranks
programme.desc: Fed up with the commercial aspects of Christmas, the Kranks decide to skip Christmas this year and forgo the gifts, the tree, the decorations and to spend the dollars saved on a Caribbean cruise.

programme.title: Christmas in Conway
programme.desc: Hoping it will be the perfect Christmas present for his wife, a man plans to construct a Ferris wheel in his backyard.

programme.title: Christmas in Conway
programme.desc: Hoping it will be the perfect Christmas present for his wife, a man plans to construct a Ferris wheel in his backyard.

programme.title: The Green Hornet
programme.desc: Britt Reid is a layabout party animal until he finds a seriously cool career - crime-fighting action hero. He teams up with gadget wiz and martial arts master Kato to take on LA's underworld.

programme.title: Troy
programme.desc: For the love of a beautiful woman a city will burn to the ground. An epic tale of honour, war, forbidden passion and the towering Trojan Horse.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible - Rogue Nation
programme.desc: Ethan and team take on their most impossible mission yet, eradicating a highly skilled international rogue organisation that is committed to destroying the IMF.

programme.title: The Mummy: Tomb of the Dragon Emperor
Hummingbird
programme.desc: After returning from Afghanistan disillusioned, damaged and homeless, an ex-Special Forces commando is drawn into the violence and criminality of London's dangerous underworld.

programme.title: Jack Reacher: Never Go Back
programme.desc: When an Army Major is framed for treason, Reacher discovers she's the target of a massive government conspiracy and risks everything to take down the corrupt organisation.

programme.title: The Anarchists
programme.desc: As the sixth Anarchapulco gets underway, the community reel from accusations of a fraudulent crypto scheme and another shocking death.

programme.title: The Anarchists
programme.desc: As the sixth Anarchapulco gets underway, the community reel from accusations of a fraudulent crypto scheme and another shocking death.

programme.title: Imma Tataranni: Deputy Prosecutor
programme.desc: Imma investigates when the body of a boy is found by the road in Nova Siri.

programme.title: Imma Tataranni: Deputy Prosecutor
programme.desc: Imma investigates when the body of a boy is found by the road in Nova Siri.

programme.title: Imma Tataranni: Deputy Prosecutor
programme.desc: he mummified corpse of an architect, missing for 15 years, is found in a ravine outside Matera.

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Did Michael Jackson create a gang truce? Did Nickelback get the last laugh? Is Rosanna Arquette the ultimate 80s muse?

programme.title: Music's Greatest Mysteries
programme.desc: Did Michael Jackson create a gang truce? Did Nickelback get the last laugh? Is Rosanna Arquette the ultimate 80s muse?

programme.title: Secrets of the Hells Angels
programme.desc: The Hells Angels' darkest secret: using hang-arounds and wannabes to kill rivals. Ted Soke grooms his son Donny into a serial killer for the club.

programme.title: Secrets of the Hells Angels
programme.desc: The Hells Angels' darkest secret: using hang-arounds and wannabes to kill rivals. Ted Soke grooms his son Donny into a serial killer for the club.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The bucolic coastal waters off Brokenwood support a thriving fishing industry. But when Jared discovers a severed human hand in a crayfish pot, it appears to be harbouring something far more sinister.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The bucolic coastal waters off Brokenwood support a thriving fishing industry. But when Jared discovers a severed human hand in a crayfish pot, it appears to be harbouring something far more sinister.

programme.title: Justified
programme.desc: Enforcing his own brand of justice, US Marshal Raylan, a strong-willed, quiet law-man haunted by his past, returns to his native town to see that justice is served to those in need.

programme.title: Justified
programme.desc: Enforcing his own brand of justice, US Marshal Raylan, a strong-willed, quiet law-man haunted by his past, returns to his native town to see that justice is served to those in need.

programme.title: The Shield
programme.desc: A group of cops bend the rules to boost results. Their captain disapproves, until he sees how their actions can serve his own political agenda.

programme.title: The Shield
programme.desc: A group of cops bend the rules to boost results. Their captain disapproves, until he sees how their actions can serve his own political agenda.

programme.title: Secrets of the Hells Angels
programme.desc: The Hells Angels' darkest secret: using hang-arounds and wannabes to kill rivals. Ted Soke grooms his son Donny into a serial killer for the club.

programme.title: Secrets of the Hells Angels
programme.desc: The Hells Angels' darkest secret: using hang-arounds and wannabes to kill rivals. Ted Soke grooms his son Donny into a serial killer for the club.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: The Jackal visits a specialist armorer with a special commission for his next job but with Bianca also tracking Norman down, she is starting to close in on the Jackal.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: The Jackal visits a specialist armorer with a special commission for his next job but with Bianca also tracking Norman down, she is starting to close in on the Jackal.

programme.title: Justified
programme.desc: Enforcing his own brand of justice, US Marshal Raylan, a strong-willed, quiet law-man haunted by his past, returns to his native town to see that justice is served to those in need.

programme.title: Justified
programme.desc: Enforcing his own brand of justice, US Marshal Raylan, a strong-willed, quiet law-man haunted by his past, returns to his native town to see that justice is served to those in need.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the survivors prepare to escape the area by raft, Alicia turns back to save one more person trapped in the fallout.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the survivors prepare to escape the area by raft, Alicia turns back to save one more person trapped in the fallout.

programme.title: The Death of Bunny Munro
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sex-addict traveling salesman who uses his door-to-door beauty products to meet women.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: The Jackal visits a specialist armorer with a special commission for his next job but with Bianca also tracking Norman down, she is starting to close in on the Jackal.

programme.title: The Day of the Jackal
programme.desc: The Jackal visits a specialist armorer with a special commission for his next job but with Bianca also tracking Norman down, she is starting to close in on the Jackal.

programme.title: The Shield
programme.desc: A group of cops bend the rules to boost results. Their captain disapproves, until he sees how their actions can serve his own political agenda.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: Guillermo's fate hangs in the balance as the vampires receive a promotion.

programme.title: What We Do in the Shadows
What We Do in the Shadows
programme.desc: A forbidden artifact is used to help Nandor court a health club employee.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The bucolic coastal waters off Brokenwood support a thriving fishing industry. But when Jared discovers a severed human hand in a crayfish pot, it appears to be harbouring something far more sinister.

programme.title: The Brokenwood Mysteries
programme.desc: The bucolic coastal waters off Brokenwood support a thriving fishing industry. But when Jared discovers a severed human hand in a crayfish pot, it appears to be harbouring something far more sinister.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: As Cathy checks into a hospice to die, the tensions between Paul and Adam boil over. Meanwhile, Sean has second thoughts about being an organ donor.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: As Cathy checks into a hospice to die, the tensions between Paul and Adam boil over. Meanwhile, Sean has second thoughts about being an organ donor.

programme.title: The Big C
programme.desc: As Cathy checks into a hospice to die, the tensions between Paul and Adam boil over. Meanwhile, Sean has second thoughts about being an organ donor.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Heart surgeon Charlotte and her husband, consultant anesthetist Jacob are a high-flying married couple. But things soon turn upside down when their mysterious new colleague Mia rents out the house next door.

programme.title: The Couple Next Door
programme.desc: Heart surgeon Charlotte and her husband, consultant anesthetist Jacob are a high-flying married couple. But things soon turn upside down when their mysterious new colleague Mia rents out the house next door.

programme.title: The Shield
programme.desc: A group of cops bend the rules to boost results. Their captain disapproves, until he sees how their actions can serve his own political agenda.

programme.title: The Shield
programme.desc: A group of cops bend the rules to boost results. Their captain disapproves, until he sees how their actions can serve his own political agenda.

programme.title: Fear the Walking Dead
programme.desc: As the survivors prepare to escape the area by raft, Alicia turns back to save one more person trapped in the fallout.

programme.title: Mamma Mia! Here We Go Again
You're Bacon Me Crazy
programme.desc: Cleo Morelli, an aspiring Portland chef, tries to win a food truck competition. When a handsome chef from a rival food truck parks across the street from her, Cleo's goal to win takes a spicy turn.

programme.title: Love Happens
programme.desc: A grieving self-help guru and a recently single florist's lives come crashing together at exactly the wrong time. Does love stand a chance?

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When an alien with amazing powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the intergalactic visitor home before a sinister organisation can capture her.

programme.title: Shaun The Sheep Movie: Farmageddon
programme.desc: When an alien with powers crash-lands near Mossy Bottom Farm, Shaun the Sheep goes on a mission to shepherd the visitor home before a sinister organisation can capture her.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria find themselves in Africa, where Alex meets his long-lost parents. Meanwhile, Makunga, his father's rival, will stop at nothing to be the king of the jungle.

programme.title: Madagascar: Escape 2 Africa
programme.desc: Alex, Marty, Melman and Gloria find themselves in Africa, where Alex meets his long-lost parents. Meanwhile, Makunga, his father's rival, will stop at nothing to be the king of the jungle.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: Shrek
programme.desc: An ogre, with the help of an annoying donkey, tries to win back his swamp by returning a princess to a scheming lord.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and fire-breathing dragons, a Viking teenager takes in an injured dragon and sees an opportunity to set his tribe on a new course.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon
programme.desc: Set in the mythical world of burly Vikings and fire-breathing dragons, a Viking teenager takes in an injured dragon and sees an opportunity to set his tribe on a new course.

programme.title: The Secret Garden (2020)
programme.desc: When Mary Lennox's parents suddenly die, she is sent to live with her uncle, Archibald Craven, on his remote country estate deep in the Yorkshire moors. While exploring, she discovers a hidden magical garden.

programme.title: The Secret Garden (2020)
programme.desc: When Mary Lennox's parents suddenly die, she is sent to live with her uncle, Archibald Craven, on his remote country estate deep in the Yorkshire moors. While exploring, she discovers a hidden magical garden.

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: Curse Of Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Wallace and Gromit's latest enterprise is Anti-Pesto, pest control with a heart. When called upon by the dotty Lady Tottington to solve her rabbit infestation, Wallace tangles with her Ladyship's would-be suitor, rotten cad Victor Quartermaine. At first Wallace and Gromit seem to have things in hand. But Wallace's mind transference device malfunctions, and he's in danger of being bagged by Quartermaine. Wallace teeters perilously close to disaster and his four-legged pal, Gromit, faces almost insurmountable odds to save the day!

programme.title: Wallace & Gromit: Curse Of Were-Rabbit
programme.desc: Wallace and Gromit's latest enterprise is Anti-Pesto, pest control with a heart. When called upon by the dotty Lady Tottington to solve her rabbit infestation, Wallace tangles with her Ladyship's would-be suitor, rotten cad Victor Quartermaine. At first Wallace and Gromit seem to have things in hand. But Wallace's mind transference device malfunctions, and he's in danger of being bagged by Quartermaine. Wallace teeters perilously close to disaster and his four-legged pal, Gromit, faces almost insurmountable odds to save the day!

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: After discovering an ice cave that is home to hundreds of new types of dragons, Hiccup and Toothless find themselves at the centre of a battle to prevent a costly war across their land.

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon 2
programme.desc: From the Academy Award nominated film How to Train Your Dragon comes the next chapter in the epic trilogy. When Hiccup and Toothless discover a secret ice cave filled with hundreds of wild dragons and a mysterious Dragon Rider, the two friends find themselves at the centre of an epic battle to save the future of men and dragons!

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: Jurassic Park
programme.desc: An experiment with dinosaurs created from DNA becomes a disaster when sabotage sets the prehistoric monsters loose in an island theme park.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: After Puss in Boots was blamed for a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against his wishes by Humpty Dumpty, Puss leaves Humpty to his fate. Now reunited, they try to trust each other again.

programme.title: Puss in Boots
programme.desc: Before he met the ogre Shrek, Puss in Boots (voice of Antonio Banderas) had a complicated life in which he was smeared with the blame of a bank robbery in San Ricardo, engineered against Puss' wishes by Humpty Dumpty (Zach Galifianakis), who was captured while trying to escape - thanks to Puss leaving him to his fate in anger. The two lifelong friends break up and it isn't until they re-unite that they trust each other again.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Four spoiled animals from the New York Central Zoo escape with the unintentional help of four fugitive penguins. They subsequently find themselves in Madagascar amidst happy lemurs.

programme.title: Madagascar
programme.desc: Four spoiled animals from the New York Central Zoo escape with the unintentional help of four fugitive penguins. They subsequently find themselves in Madagascar amidst happy lemurs.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: The woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat.

programme.title: Over the Hedge
programme.desc: Spring has sprung, and Verne and his woodland friends awaken from their long winter's nap to discover that a large, green hedge has cropped up right through the middle of their once-natural habitat. Enter RJ, an opportunistic raccoon who explains that the world beyond the hedge is 'the gateway to the good life' where peculiar creatures called humans live to eat, rather than eat to live. "For humans," RJ proclaims, "enough is never enough."

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: Shrek 2
programme.desc: Happily ever after will have to wait as Shrek, Princess Fiona, and Donkey visit the in-laws. Outraged that Fiona has wed an ogre, the King hires hit man Puss in Boots to make the problem disappear.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Spider-Man's greatest battle begins when an evil corporation attempts world domination by deploying an army of super villains to crush Peter Parker.

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man 2
programme.desc: Spider-Man's greatest battle begins when an evil corporation attempts world domination by deploying an army of super villains to crush Peter Parker.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: The Wild Robot
programme.desc: Shipwrecked on a deserted island, a robot named Roz must learn to adapt to its new surroundings. Building relationships with the native animals, Roz soon develops a parental bond with an orphaned gosling.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Gru, his adorable girls, and the mischievous Minions are back with a cast of unforgettable new characters in the blockbuster sequel to the worldwide phenomenon. Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world. Partnered with secret agent Lucy Wilde, Gru, along with the wildly unpredictable Minions, must figure out how to keep his cover while also keeping up with his duties as a father. Get ready for more Minion madness.

programme.title: Despicable Me 2
programme.desc: Get ready for more Minion madness! Just as Gru has given up being super-bad to be a super-dad, the Anti-Villain League recruits him to track down a new criminal mastermind and save the world.

programme.title: King of the Apocalypse
programme.desc: Dakota Adams, son of Oath Keepers' Stewart Rhodes, explores the American militia movement and his father's conviction for seditious conspiracy, amidst a turbulent family life.

programme.title: The Bikeriders
programme.desc: Over the course of a decade, a Midwestern motorcycle club evolves from a gathering place for local outsiders to a sinister gang, threatening the original group's way of life.

programme.title: Man With No Past
programme.desc: A man wakes up in a strange city with no memory. His search for answers leads to a clash with a powerful enemy, uncovering the truth about his identity.

programme.title: Longlegs
programme.desc: In pursuit of a serial killer, an FBI agent uncovers a series of occult clues that she must solve to end his terrifying killing spree.

programme.title: I Now Pronounce You Chuck & Larry
Galaxy Quest
programme.desc: The alumni cast of a cult space TV show have to play their roles as the real thing when an alien race needs their help.
